document.title: Tengri137 — V4 Glyph-First Mixed-Media Reconstruction
document.description: Tengri137 23-page PDF reconstructed with V4 Glyph-First pipeline. NO Tesseract for glyphs (V4 PIVOT from V3). First-principles pixel-based component detection + Multi-Resolution-Embeddings + 3-Level-Clustering + Vision-Quercheck. Schmeh 2017 raw_text.txt is used as HINT (NOT truth) for validation.
